MINI MINUTES:

APPEARANCES (VIA ZOOM VIDEOCONFERENCE):
Atty. NIKKI TRENNER, Esq. of Crosner Legal, PC (Tel: 310-496-5818) for plaintiff Patrick Bradford;
Atty. MATTHEW D. GURNICK, Esq. of Costangy, Brooks, Smith & Prophete, LLP (Tel: 310-909-7775) for defendants Professional Technical Security Services, Inc. and Sergio Reyes.

HEARING RE: PLAINTIFF PATRICK BRADFORD's Motion For Final Approval Of Class Action Settlement.

Matter discussed. Defense counsel informs the Court that defendants have filed for bankruptcy in federal court.

The Court vacates its tentative ruling, and orders that this action is stayed until remanded from bankruptcy court.

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Preliminary Approval Of Class Action Settlement; Court Reporter Fees Paid
Off Calendar Sep-20-2021 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances via Zoom Conference
Jamie Serb, Esq; (310) 496-5818; CROSNER LEGAL, PC; for Plaintiff, Patrick Bradford.
Matthew D. Gurnick, Esq; 310-909-7775; costangy, brooks, smith & Prophete, LLP, for Defendants Professional Techinical Security Services, Inc, et al .

Hearing is held. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

PLAINTIFF PATRICK BRADFORD's Motion For Preliminary Approval Of Class Action Settlement

The Court has reviewed plaintiff's supplemental brief and supporting declaration, including the executed addendum to the proposed settlement agreement and release, and hereby grants plaintiff's motion for preliminary approval of the proposed settlement agreement and release, as amended. Hearing for Final Fairness/Approval Of Class Action Settlement is set for February 8, 2022 at 9:30 a.m. (as fully reported in the reporter's notes/transcript)

Order granting preliminary approval of class action settlement is signed.

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman, Clerk: W. Trupek, Court Reporter: Maria Torreano CSR# 8600, email: maria.torreano@gmail.com, Reported. (302/EPS)

*Joint Order and stipulation re: 1st amended complaint is signed. *

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Preliminary Approval Of Class Action Settlement
Off Calendar Aug-23-2021 Continued To Sep-20-21 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:

APPEARANCES (VIA ZOOM VIDEOCONFERENCE):
Atty. JAMIE SERB, Esq. of Crosner Legal, P.C. (Tel: 310-496-5818) for plaintiff Patrick Bradford;
Attys. BARBARA I. ANTONUCCI, Esq. (Tel: 415-918-3000) and MATTHEW D. GURNICK, Esq. (Tel: 310-909-7775) of Constangy, Brooks, Smith & Prophete, LLP for defendants Professional Technical Security Services, Inc. and Sergio Reyes.

HEARING RE: PLAINTIFF PATRICK BRADFORD's Motion For Preliminary Approval Of Class Action Settlement.

The Court and counsel discuss a deadline for a further submission by parties to address the issues outlined in the Court's tentative ruling.

The parties' further submission is due by September 13, 2021.

This matter is continued for further hearing to September 20, 2021 at 9:30 a.m. in Dept. 302, Law & Motion.

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman; Clerk: Sean Kane; Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR No. 8600, Email: maria.torreano@gmail.com (302/EPS)
